tasks.intent:
You are a computer use agent executing a multi-step BoatTrader lead extraction → PopYachts lead entry workflow.

INPUTS:
- zip_code: 33101
- search_radius: 35 miles
- pop_password: SelfService38#

Execute through normal browser interactions only — mouse clicks, keyboard typing, scrolling, reading visible text. No developer tools, no console, no scripts.

=== STEP 1: Search BoatTrader ===
1. You are on https://www.boattrader.com/boats/
2. Enter 33101 in the zip code/location field
3. Set radius to 35 miles
4. Set minimum price to 35000
5. Select 'Private Seller' in the seller type filter
6. Sort by 'Recently Updated' newest first
7. Wait for results to load

=== STEP 2: Process ALL listings on the page ===
For EACH listing on the results page:

a) Click the listing to open it
b) Scroll through the page. Read the Description and More Details sections carefully.
c) Look for a phone number:
   - Valid: (555) 555-5555, 555-555-5555, 555.555.5555, 10+ consecutive digits, +1 formats
   - NOT valid: prices, years, zip codes, obfuscated numbers (<7 digits)
d) If phone found (VIABLE):
   - Extract: year, make, model (from title), asking price (numbers only), boat type, listing URL (from address bar), seller name (or 'Unknown'), seller phone
   - Remember this data for PopYachts entry
e) If no phone found: mark as 'skipped - no phone'
f) Go back to search results (Alt+Left)
g) Move to the next listing

=== STEP 3: For EACH viable lead, enter into PopYachts ===
First time only — authenticate:
a) Open new tab (Ctrl+T), go to https://admin.popyachts.com/
b) Click 'Sign in with Google'
c) Email: svsg@popsells.com → Next
d) Password: SelfService38# → Next
e) If 2FA requested: report and stop
f) Scroll DOWN past dashboard to find 'User Management' (NOT the top-left dropdown)
g) Select 'Erin NesSmith'
h) Navigate to: https://admin.popyachts.com/Page/Account-Main-Seller-Lead-Review-External/NA/Page.html

For each viable lead:
i) Select 'Outside Boat Lead'
j) Fill ALL fields: Year, Make, Model, Type, Asking Price, Seller Name, Seller Phone, Listing URL
k) Click Submit
l) If URL changes → success. If form clears but URL unchanged → silent rejection, do NOT retry
m) Switch back to BoatTrader tab for next lead

ONE login attempt only. If it fails, skip PopYachts and just report extracted leads.

=== STEP 4: Pagination ===
After all listings on current page are processed:
- Scroll to bottom, look for Next page button
- If exists and clickable: click it, wait for new results, continue processing
- If no more pages: generate final report

=== STEP 5: Final Report ===
Call terminate('success') with:
- Total listings processed
- Viable leads found (with all data: year, make, model, price, phone, URL)
- Leads entered into PopYachts (success/failure for each)
- Skipped listings (no phone)
- Any errors encountered

CRITICAL:
- Process ALL listings, not just 2-3
- ONE PopYachts login attempt only
- If form submission fails, move on — never retry
- Read ALL data visually from screenshots
- Keep track of every listing processed
